ddls:
CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data entry */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the financial instrument */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the market data entry */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the instrument on the recorded date */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the instrument on the recorded date */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the instrument on the recorded date */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the instrument on the recorded date */,
  "volume" REAL /* Volume of trades for the instrument on the recorded date */,
  "open_interest" INTEGER /* Open interest in the instrument on the recorded date */,
  "trading_session" TEXT /* Trading session (e.g., Morning, Afternoon, Evening) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial instrument */,
  "instrument_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial instrument (e.g., Stock, Option) */,
  "instrument_type" TEXT /* Type of the financial instrument (e.g., Equity, Index, Option) */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Exchange where the instrument is traded */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the financial instrument (e.g., Technology, Finance) */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the financial instrument (e.g., Software, Banking) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the instrument was added to the database */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, trader, analyst) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_strategies" (
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading strategy */,
  "strategy_name" TEXT /* Name of the trading strategy */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the trading strategy */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the strategy */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the strategy was created */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the strategy is active or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("strategy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_strategies_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content or summary of the report */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., Daily, Weekly, Monthly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data_index" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the market data entry */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the financial instrument */,
  "index_value" REAL /* Index value of the financial instrument */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id", "instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data_option" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the market data entry */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the financial instrument */,
  "strike_price" REAL /* Strike price of the option */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the option */,
  "option_type" TEXT /* Type of the option (e.g., Call, Put) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id", "instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data_stock" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the market data entry */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the financial instrument */,
  "dividend_yield" REAL /* Dividend yield of the stock */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id", "instrument_id")
)
